chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 02 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 29/2027. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 31/2027. 3. For hearing of CMA No. 32/2027. 4. For hearing of CMA No. 33/2027. 5. For hearing of CMA No. 35/2027. 6. For hearing of CMA No. 38/2027. 7. For hearing of CMA No. 39/2027. 8. For order on Nazir Report dated 07.02.2017. 9. For hearing of Main Petition. 30.03.2026. Mr. Arsalan Ahmed, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Imtiaz Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** Mr. Arsalan Ahmed, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Imtiaz Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner, who states that he was present in Court, but for some reason has now left the Court Room. It appears that none has been appearing on behalf of the Petitioner, and this matter has been pending for the last 9 years without any significant progress. Accordingly, this Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith all pending applications. JUDGE AYAZ
